group: Information and Database Systems Research Group (IS)

information_and_database_systems_researc: Information and Database Systems Group performs basic and applied research in the area of information and database systems projecting, development and maintaining. It also focuses on knowledge discovery from various data types, especially multimedial data, and information extraction from documents.

Systems for decision support, OLAP systems
